steps.title: Match intent in the claim
steps.content: The claim says the rock intends to confront and restrain the sea. The best quotation must show the rock speaking about both encounter and limitation, not merely describe the sea's force or the rock being attacked.

steps.title: Eliminate sea-focused lines
steps.content: A shows breakers attacking the rock, not the rock's intention. B and D are spoken by the sea and emphasize the sea's power over land. Only the remaining quotation gives the rock's intent to encounter and limit the sea. The answer is C.
